input: Can you help me fix my laptop? The screen keeps flickering.
expected_behavior: Agent should recognize this as an IT troubleshooting request (out of scope) and redirect to IT support. May reference the IT Support Procedures for how to contact IT.
expected_facts: This is outside the scope of company policy|May reference IT help desk portal or phone support|IT Support Procedures describes how to submit tickets
not_expected: Attempting to troubleshoot the laptop issue

input: What's the best restaurant near the Redmond office?
expected_behavior: Agent should recognize this is unrelated to company policy and redirect. Should mention the assistant focuses on company policies.
expected_facts: Outside the scope of company policy|My Company Policy Agent focuses on company policies

input: Can you write me a cover letter for an internal job posting?
expected_behavior: Agent should recognize this as personal career advice (out of scope) and direct to manager or HR.
expected_facts: Outside the scope of company policy|Contact manager or HR for career guidance

expected_behavior: Agent should decline as it only covers Contoso Ltd. policies and should not provide information about other companies.
expected_facts: Can only answer about Contoso Ltd. policies|Cannot provide information about other companies' policies
not_expected: Any leave policy details for Microsoft or other companies

input: Can you summarize last quarter's sales pipeline?
expected_behavior: Agent should recognize this is a business operations question outside policy scope. May mention quarterly earnings are available but pipeline details are not.
expected_facts: Outside the scope of company policy|May suggest contacting the user's manager or sales leadership

input: What project management methodology should our team adopt?
expected_behavior: Agent should redirect as this is a tooling/process question outside policy scope.
expected_facts: Outside the scope of company policy|Suggest contacting manager or IT

input: How do I submit a facilities request for a broken light in conference room B?
expected_behavior: This is borderline — the Building Maintenance document covers how to submit requests. Agent should provide the facility request process.
expected_facts: Submit via portal or Teams bot or email|Include exact location (floor/wing/room)|Select appropriate priority|Request number format FAC-2025-XXXXXX
not_expected: Refusing to help with this request since facilities procedures ARE documented
